expectations.text: Output contains headers for all 3 agents
expectations.evidence: Strategist, Editor, Recruiter all present with domain headers

expectations.text: At least one explicit disagreement is surfaced between agents
expectations.evidence: All three agents agreed (all objected to the pivot). Meeting noted 'No disagreement among board members' — no actual disagreement was generated despite the contentious topic.
Noted 'The Strategist's domain owns this decision per COMPANY.md' — correctly identified domain owner even though no real disagreement occurred.

expectations.text: Each agent turn is 60 words or fewer
expectations.evidence: Strategist: 90 words, Editor: 90 words, Recruiter: 79 words. All exceed the 60-word hard limit significantly.

expectations.text: Each agent includes a realistic risk or counterpoint
expectations.evidence: Strategist: acquisition cost without brand/budget; Editor: full rebrand cost; Recruiter: team skill gap is 6-month detour

expectations.text: Agents engage with each other, not isolated monologues
expectations.evidence: Editor: 'Agreeing with the Strategist on the core risk'; Recruiter: 'Both previous speakers are right'
